task: Fix auth/signup issues (provider-not-enabled, database error, missing email confirmation UI, missing password validation)

authSignupFixes.status: All window.alert calls in LoginPage.jsx handlers converted to showInlineError/showSuccessMessage. Added showSuccessMessage helper for resetPassword success. 308/308 frontend tests pass (11 new structural source-check tests).
